# Jeremy Joseph Curry

> Jeremy Joseph Curry is a software engineer and app developer based in Nepal.

## Official profile

- Website: https://jeremyjosephcurry.com/
- About: https://jeremyjosephcurry.com/about

- Contact: mailto:hello@jeremyjosephcurry.com
- LinkedIn profile: https://www.linkedin.com/in/jeremyjosephcurry
- GitHub profile: https://github.com/jeremy3004-dot

## Focus

Jeremy builds mobile apps, web applications, websites, backend systems, APIs, and AI-powered software for founders, businesses, and remote teams.
